'''Lish''' was the sixth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Demar system/Legends|Demar system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. A large, blue-green gas giant, Lish was orbited by fifteen [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

The [[Lant Mining Corporation]] set up mines on ten of the world's fifteen moons during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], though eventually abandoned all but their mines on [[Lish V]] and [[Lish XI]].

{{Planet-stub}}
